name: What's evidence I need for noise hearing loss workers comp? Panicking, no records.
description: Audiogram, exposure proof, expert link to job—get tested now.[5]

mainEntity.name: What's evidence I need for noise hearing loss workers comp? Panicking, no records.

acceptedAnswer.text: Audiogram, exposure proof, expert link to job—get tested now.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Audiogram confirming loss, job description/noise logs, coworker affidavits, medical opinion on causation.[5] Photos/videos of equipment help.[4] Key factors: High-frequency dip pattern indicates noise, pre/post-job tests ideal, OSHA logs if cited.[5][7] Start with doctor visit for baseline test, request employer noise surveys.[2] Lawyer reconstructs missing proof.[5]
